title: Citrus Glazed Goat Skewers with Veggie Crumble
description: A sweet and tangy twist on traditional skewers, paired with a crunchy veggie crumble for a delightful summer dish.

ingredients.name: citrus
ingredients.amount: 1 cup freshly squeezed juice (orange, lemon, and lime)

ingredients.name: veggie
ingredients.amount: 2 cups mixed colorful vegetables (bell peppers, onions, mushrooms, cherry tomatoes)

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together citrus juice, salt, and pepper.
Add the mixed vegetables to the bowl and toss to coat with the citrus glaze.
Thread the vegetables onto the goat skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, flipping occasionally, until the vegetables are tender.
Meanwhile, prepare the veggie crumble by mixing the gluten-free oat crumble mix with a pinch of salt.
After the skewers have cooked for 8 minutes, sprinkle the veggie crumble on top and continue grilling for another 2-3 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
